summary: DuckDuckGo entry.duckai.js SSE data handler 역공학 완료. Vercel AI SDK 스트림 형식 사용 확인 — OpenAI choices/delta 형식이 아님.

sse_data_flow: 1. fetch() with accept:'text/event-stream' header → response stream
2. eventsource-parser (vendor bundle) parses SSE format → calls onmessage callback
3. onmessage(e) → passes e.data as streamData to D() function
4. D() parses streamData → handles types: text-delta, reasoning, source, refusal, instant-answer, ui-component, partial-image
5. case 'text-delta' → reads r.text, appends to chunk → UI renders

onmessage_handler.note: SSE event e.data is passed as streamData to function D()

text_delta_handler.behavior: Reads r.text and appends to existing chunk text (a.chunk.text + r.text). Uses partIndex for multi-part responses.

onParse.note: Not in entry.duckai — lives in vendor bundle eventsource-parser

CHAT_TITLE.note: Mostly UI labels (DUCKCHAT_VOICE_CHAT_TITLE, DUCKCHAT_DELETE_CHAT_TITLE, etc). onGeneratedChatTitle callback in D() handles chat title from stream.

DONE.note: Stream termination likely handled in vendor eventsource-parser or via complete flag

text-delta.note: KEY handler for text content rendering

getReader.note: Not in entry.duckai — stream reading is in vendor bundle

choices.note: Only in translation prompt template — NOT in SSE parsing

delta.note: text-delta case + math symbols + event tracking — NOT OpenAI delta format

critical_implication_for_apf.stream_format: Vercel AI SDK stream protocol — NOT OpenAI SSE format
critical_implication_for_apf.correct_format: AI SDK uses typed stream parts: 0:text-delta with {text:'...'} field
critical_implication_for_apf.apf_action_required: APF warning template for DuckDuckGo must send data in AI SDK stream format, not OpenAI format. Each SSE event data should be a typed stream part that D() function can parse.
critical_implication_for_apf.example_sse_data: The streamData passed to D() is parsed into objects with type='text-delta' and text='warning message'. The exact wire format needs further investigation of D() parser, but it follows Vercel AI SDK stream protocol.
critical_implication_for_apf.reasoning_support: Also supports type='reasoning' with similar text field for reasoning/thinking content

files_searched: entry.duckai.e7afac0ca6fbc4197b28.js (app bundle — SSE handler, D() function, text-delta case)
next_steps: Investigate exact wire format of AI SDK stream protocol. The D() function in entry.duckai parses streamData from eventsource-parser. Need to determine if streamData is JSON or has specific prefix format (e.g., '0:"text chunk"' for text-delta).
